errors.message:
Error: 

❌  SMOKE_BASE_URL env var is required to run the smoke suite.

   Set it to the deployed server URL in your deploy-time secrets:
     SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://meta-trader-link.replit.app

   For the full cascade scenario also add:
     DEMO_MT5_LOGIN=<login>
     DEMO_MT5_PASSWORD=<password>
     DEMO_MT5_SERVER=<broker server name>

   Without these secrets the smoke step is not a meaningful guard.
